creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Needs new pkg-plist:
--------------------
bin/drood
bin/scgid
bin/dorrit
etc/rc.d/drood
etc/rc.d/scgid
etc/rc.d/dorrit
@unexec if cmp -s %D/etc/drood/types.tab %D/etc/drood/types.tab.dist; 
then rm -f %D/etc/drood/types.tab; fi
etc/drood/types.tab.dist
@dirrm /etc/drood
-----------------------
